commands: Confirm the current sorting algorithm used in the application before proceeding with optimization strategies to ensure accuracy.
Clarify that the in-place merge approach can be implemented without losing stability, as it can be designed to manage element swaps carefully, thus retaining the order of equal elements.
Provide a more detailed explanation of the hybrid approach, including specific thresholds for switching from QuickSort to InsertionSort based on empirical data or standard practices.
Include empirical evidence or references to support the performance claims made about QuickSort and MergeSort, especially regarding their average and worst-case time complexities.
Suggest specific libraries or frameworks that could facilitate the implementation of parallel sorting to enhance performance further.
